scripts.share:collect: pnpm share:secrets && pi-share-hf collect --workspace .pi/hf-sessions --env-file .envrc --secret .pi/hf-private/secrets.txt --deny .pi/hf-private/deny.txt AGENTS.md docs/prd.md docs/cf-prototype-architecture.md docs/effect-twitch-architecture.md
scripts.share:review: pnpm share:secrets && pi-share-hf review --workspace .pi/hf-sessions --deny .pi/hf-private/deny.txt AGENTS.md docs/prd.md docs/cf-prototype-architecture.md docs/effect-twitch-architecture.md
